drinks.name: Espresso
drinks.description: A strong and concentrated coffee served in small shots with a rich flavor and creamy crema.

drinks.name: Cappuccino
drinks.description: A smooth espresso-based drink topped with steamed milk and thick milk foam.

drinks.name: Americano
drinks.description: Espresso diluted with hot water for a smoother and lighter taste.

drinks.name: Latte
drinks.description: A creamy coffee drink made with espresso and a large amount of steamed milk.

drinks.name: Mocha
drinks.description: A chocolate-flavored coffee drink blended with espresso, milk, and cocoa.

drinks.name: Macchiato
drinks.description: Espresso marked with a small amount of milk foam for a bold but balanced taste.

drinks.name: Flat White
drinks.description: A velvety coffee drink with espresso and microfoam milk for a smooth texture.

drinks.name: Cold Brew
drinks.description: Coffee brewed slowly in cold water for a refreshing and less acidic flavor.

drinks.name: Affogato
drinks.description: A dessert-style coffee made by pouring hot espresso over vanilla ice cream.

drinks.name: Irish Coffee
drinks.description: Hot coffee blended with sugar, cream, and Irish whiskey for a rich flavor.
